stage_n_budget_decision.reason: Stage N adds one executable same-corpus quality gate, duplicate-resistant scoring, live Qwen evidence, and production no-match enforcement for optional recall adapters.
stage_n_budget_decision.constraint: No further increase is allowed for Stage O; engineering maturity work must hold or reduce these ceilings.

policy: Budgets are ratchets, not targets to fill.
Optional AI, memory, OCR, ASR, and search dependencies stay outside the minimal core.
A budget increase requires measured user value and an explicit roadmap decision.
